prestazioni: Engine swap to AMC's 390ci (6.4L) V8 (engine code: AMX-390) with forged internals including a Scat Enterprises 4340 forged crankshaft, Manley H-beam connecting rods, and JE Pistons 12.5:1 compression forged pistons, paired with a Comp Cams Xtreme Energy 292H hydraulic roller camshaft (248°/254° duration, 0.544"/0.565" lift) for high-RPM power delivery

Custom forced induction setup using a Precision Turbo & Engine PT8285CE turbocharger (85mm inducer) with a Tial MV-R 44mm external wastegate, custom 3.5" intercooler piping by Vibrant Performance, and a PWR 4.5-core intercooler with 1000hp capability, fed by dual Bosch 044 fuel pumps and Injector Dynamics ID2000x injectors

Full drivetrain reinforcement including a McLeod RST twin-disc clutch with billet flywheel, a Ford 9" rear end with Strange Engineering S-Trac differential (3.73:1 gear ratio), and a custom 3.5" driveshaft by Driveshaft Shop with CV-style joints for high torque capacity
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using a Rare Drive Autoworks AMC Marlin-specific kit, extending fenders by 3.5" front and 4" rear with hand-laid carbon fiber over steel reinforcement, paired with a custom front splitter and rear diffuser by RK Sport

Retro-modern livery inspired by the 1967 AMC Marlin "Rogue" concept, featuring a custom-mixed PPG "Marlin Teal Pearl" base coat with hand-painted gold leaf accents on the side scallops and rear c-pillar, finished with a 3M matte clear coat for depth

Full interior overhaul with Recaro SRD-E fixed-back seats in black Alcantara with gold stitching, a custom roll cage by Autopower Industries with integrated harness bars for Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses, and a Momo Mod.78 steering wheel on a NRG Innovations quick-release hub
